_readme: 5 demo case studies spanning the risk spectrum (Section 4). 'sample_message' is the literal text to post in the Sangam Case Room to kick off a run. 'pk_params' are simplified one-compartment oral PK parameters (illustrative only, not clinically validated) consumed by @PKPD's simulate_pk tool.

cases.title: Warfarin + Guggulu
cases.mechanism: Guggulsterones inhibit CYP2C9 (and to a lesser extent CYP3A4), reducing warfarin clearance and increasing anticoagulant exposure -> elevated bleeding risk.
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 68F on Warfarin 5mg once daily (CYP2C9 *1/*3, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 55) has started taking Guggulu 500mg twice daily for cholesterol. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Digoxin + Yashtimadhu (Licorice)
cases.mechanism: Glycyrrhizin/glycyrrhetinic acid from licorice causes hypokalemia (pseudoaldosteronism), which potentiates digoxin's effect on cardiac Na+/K+-ATPase; glycyrrhetinic acid also inhibits P-gp, the main digoxin transporter -> digoxin toxicity risk.
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 72M on Digoxin 0.25mg once daily (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 48) has started taking Yashtimadhu (licorice root) 1g twice daily for acidity. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Metformin + Karela (Bitter Gourd)
cases.mechanism: Bitter gourd constituents (charantin, polypeptide-p) lower blood glucose via mechanisms independent of metformin, producing an additive pharmacodynamic glucose-lowering effect rather than a pharmacokinetic interaction.
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 55F on Metformin 500mg twice daily (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 75) has started drinking 100mL fresh karela (bitter gourd) juice once daily. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Tacrolimus + St. John's Wort

herbs.name: St. John's Wort
herbs.dose: 300 mg standardized extract, three times daily

cases.mechanism: Hyperforin in St. John's Wort is a potent PXR agonist that induces CYP3A4 (and P-gp), substantially lowering tacrolimus blood levels in a transplant patient who is already a reduced CYP3A4 metabolizer -> risk of subtherapeutic levels and organ rejection.
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 45M post-kidney-transplant on Tacrolimus 2mg twice daily (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 reduced, eGFR 85) has started self-medicating with St. John's Wort 300mg three times daily for low mood. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Paracetamol + Tulsi

drugs.name: Paracetamol
drugs.frequency: as needed, up to three times daily

cases.mechanism: Tulsi constituents (eugenol, ursolic acid, rosmarinic acid) show no clinically meaningful modulation of acetaminophen's metabolism at typical dietary/supplemental exposure.
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 30F (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 100) occasionally takes Paracetamol 500mg for headaches and drinks 2 cups of tulsi tea daily. Please assess for interactions.
